name: MAC-10 | 小牛皮
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been hand painted with a brown checkerboard pattern and white accents. Included with the $1,050 Premium Package
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器采用了棕色棋盘图案与白色点缀的手绘图案。 包含价值 $1050 的优质套餐
